SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Continued To Feb-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:12am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, The Knights of Saint Francis appears via CEO Christopher Martinez. No appearance is made by the Respondent.
Christopher Martinez, previously sworn, requests a continuance.
Continuance is granted, parties are to reappear on February 24, 2010.
